dict.string: DynamicIsland only uses audio capture when the music waveform visualizer or Screen Assistant recording is explicitly enabled.
DynamicIsland only uses the camera when Mirror is explicitly enabled.
DynamicIsland only requests location when the weather widget is explicitly enabled.
DynamicIsland only uses the microphone when Screen Assistant recording is explicitly enabled.
DynamicIsland only uses screen capture when Screen Assistant screenshots are explicitly enabled by using Screen Assistant.
